---
title: "Testoversikt"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}

library(ggplot2)

x_t1 <- 1; x_t2 <- 4; x_t3 <- 7

lbl_kartlegging <- "Kartleggingsdag"
lbl_laktat      <- "Laktatprofil"
lbl_2min        <- "2-min"
lbl_random      <- "Randomisert rekkef\u00f8lge"
lbl_24t         <- "24 t"
lbl_belastning  <- "Belastning tilsvarende"

y_header <- 1.18
y_line2  <- 1.00
y_line3  <- 0.85
y_line4  <- 0.70

p <- ggplot() +

  geom_segment(aes(x = 0.4, xend = 7.6, y = 0, yend = 0),
               linewidth = 0.6, colour = "grey25") +

  geom_segment(aes(x = c(x_t1, x_t2, x_t3),
                   xend = c(x_t1, x_t2, x_t3),
                   y = -0.08, yend = 0.08),
               linewidth = 0.6, colour = "grey25") +

  annotate("text", x = c(x_t1, x_t2, x_t3), y = -0.25,
           label = c("T1", "T2", "T3"), fontface = "bold", size = 5) +

  annotate("text", x = x_t1, y = y_header,
           label = lbl_kartlegging, size = 3.4, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = x_t1, y = y_line2, label = lbl_laktat,
           size = 3.0, colour = "grey15") +
  annotate("text", x = x_t1, y = y_line3, label = "VO2maks",
           size = 3.0, colour = "grey15") +
  annotate("text", x = x_t1, y = y_line4, label = lbl_2min,
           size = 3.0, colour = "grey15") +

  annotate("text", x = (x_t2 + x_t3)/2, y = y_header,
           label = lbl_belastning, size = 3.4, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("text", x = (x_t2 + x_t3)/2, y = y_line2,
           label = expression(bold("4 mmol" %.% "L"^-1 ~ "/ 50 % av topplaktat")),
           size = 3.4, colour = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = (x_t2 + x_t3)/2, y = 0.78,
           label = lbl_random, fontface = "italic",
           size = 3.0, colour = "grey25") +

  geom_segment(aes(x = x_t2, xend = x_t3, y = 0.50, yend = 0.50),
               linewidth = 0.5, colour = "grey25") +
  geom_segment(aes(x = c(x_t2, x_t3), xend = c(x_t2, x_t3),
                   y = 0.50, yend = 0.42),
               linewidth = 0.5, colour = "grey25") +

  geom_segment(aes(x = c(x_t1 + 0.05, x_t2 + 0.05),
                   xend = c(x_t2 - 0.05, x_t3 - 0.05),
                   y = -0.42, yend = -0.42),
               linewidth = 0.3, colour = "grey60") +
  annotate("text", x = c((x_t1 + x_t2)/2, (x_t2 + x_t3)/2), y = -0.55,
           label = lbl_24t, size = 3.0, colour = "grey35") +

  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.9, 1.5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(15, 15, 15, 15))

print(p)

ggsave("testforlop.png", p, width = 11, height = 4.2, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("testforlop.pdf", p, width = 11, height = 4.2)

```
